name: sharegpt-desktop
description: ShareGPT desktop client with built-in messaging and embedded ChatGPT, Gemini and Claude web access (Gemini/Claude optional).
author: Sjeary

scripts.build:next: npm --prefix src/renderer-next install && npm --prefix src/renderer-next run build
scripts.dev: node scripts/prepare-assets.mjs all && npm exec -- electron .
scripts.dev:sender: node scripts/prepare-assets.mjs sender && npm exec -- electron . --mode=sender
scripts.dev:receiver: node scripts/prepare-assets.mjs receiver && npm exec -- electron . --mode=receiver
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:next && node scripts/prepare-assets.mjs all --required && npm exec -- electron-builder --win portable
scripts.dist:win:sender: npm run build:next && node scripts/prepare-assets.mjs sender --required && npm exec -- electron-builder --win portable --config build.sender.json
scripts.dist:win:receiver: node scripts/prepare-assets.mjs receiver --required && npm exec -- electron-builder --win portable --config build.receiver.json
scripts.dist:win:split: npm run build:next && node scripts/prepare-assets.mjs sender --required && npm exec -- electron-builder --win portable --config build.sender.json && node scripts/prepare-assets.mjs receiver --required && npm exec -- electron-builder --win portable --config build.receiver.json
scripts.dist:win:installer: npm run build:next && node scripts/prepare-assets.mjs all --required && npm exec -- electron-builder --win nsis
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:next && node scripts/prepare-assets.mjs sender --required && npm exec -- electron-builder --mac dmg
scripts.dist:mac:sender: npm run build:next && node scripts/prepare-assets.mjs sender --required && npm exec -- electron-builder --mac --config build.sender.json
scripts.dist:mac:sender:dmg: node scripts/prepare-assets.mjs sender --required && npm exec -- electron-builder --mac dmg --config build.sender.json
scripts.dist:linux: node scripts/prepare-assets.mjs all --required && npm exec -- electron-builder --linux AppImage
